name: codex-manager
title: Codex Manager
description: Manage Codex MCP servers and skills with safe local operations
author: jose_de_freitas

preferences.name: configPath
preferences.title: MCP Config Path
preferences.description: Path to the Codex config.toml file.

preferences.name: skillsDir
preferences.title: Skills Folder
preferences.description: Path to the Codex skills directory.

preferences.name: editorPreference
preferences.title: Preferred Editor
preferences.description: Open files with the system default or VS Code (code).

preferences.name: argsFormat
preferences.title: Args Format
preferences.description: How to enter args in forms.

preferences.name: createBackup
preferences.label: Create Backup
preferences.description: Create a timestamped backup before writing config.toml.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
